---
title: "Thrid Meeting Record"
---

## Meeting Description

Date / Time: 31 March 2026 (4pm - 4.30pm)

Location: Zoom Meeting

Attendees: Xi Zixun, Wang Zhuoran, Jin Qinhao

## Purpose

Review for Shiny App modules and Poster Discussion

## Meeting Notes

1. Reviewed About Shiny App Modules on Design and Requirements for final submission
2. Poster Discussion

## Action Item - Owner & Deadline

1. Xi Zixun ( 1 April 2026) - Complete User Guide for Shiny App Module - Time Series Analysis.
2. Wang Zhuoran (1 April 2026) Finalisation of Poster Design, and Complete User Guide for Shiny App - Time Series Clustering
3. Jin Qinhao (1 April 2026) - Completet User Guide for Shiny App - Forecasting Model

## Expected Deliverables

1. Finalized Poster Design
2. Completed User Guide
